LEGAL REJECT LETTER YOU REQUEST JOINT LEGAL AND PHYSICAL CUSTODY IN YOUR PETITION, AND STATE IN A DECLARATION THAT YOU HAVE ATTACHED YOUR AGREEMENT FOR VISITATION. IN YOUR PROPOSED JUDGMENT YOU REQUEST SOLE PHYSICAL CUSTODY FOR YOURSELF AND DO NOT ATTACH ANY VISITATION SCHEDULE. THEREFORE THE COURT WILL ORDER JOINT LEGAL AND PHYSICAL CUSTODY WITH REASONABLE VISITATION UNLESS YOU SUBMIT A STIPULATION SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES WITH A VISITATION AGREEMENT.
